name: Wild Boar
description: Aggressive when startled. Charges first, thinks never.

sensory.sight: a low, dark shape crashing through undergrowth, tusks catching the light
sensory.sound: grunting, then the thunder of hooves on packed earth
sensory.feel: the ground shakes when it charges

encounter_hooks: churned-up earth where something rooted for food
tusk marks on tree trunks at knee height
a farmer complaining about destroyed fences
notes: Boars are unpredictable. They might ignore you or they might charge at full speed because you stepped on a twig. Farmers hate them. Hunters respect them.
